name: Naraihill Golf & Country Club
source_notes: Province inferred from name: 'Narai' (นารายณ์) refers to King Narai the Great, whose historical palace (Phra Narai Ratchaniwet, 1666) is the centrepiece of Lopburi city. Lopburi is in central Thailand, ~153 km from Bangkok (~2 hours). If in Lopburi, this course would be accessible as a Bangkok day-trip. Hole count 18 assumed — directories list as full course. All fees, phone, GPS, and specific location within Lopburi province unknown. Note: Lopburi is technically 'Central Thailand' not 'Northern' — this course may have been miscategorised into North-Misc.
